lane.title: 03 Delivery Aggregator
lane.last_task: Create WABA aggregator session alert template
lane.last_summary: Submitted WhatsApp Business utility template aggregator_session_expired_alert_v1 through existing HN Meta/WABA template API. Meta accepted template id 1250650277143457 with status PENDING, category UTILITY, rejected_reason NONE. Template alerts when a Swiggy/Zomato session for HE/NCH is failing and asks owner to refresh partner API cURL session.
lane.next_action: Poll template until APPROVED; after approval wire aggregator health failure detection to send this template to Nihaf when direct API replay returns 401/403 or stale-session state.
lane.mutation_status: WABA template creation mutation only; no message sends, no partner portal/POS/Odoo/ad/price/offer mutation

recent_events.summary: Defined safest UX for Swiggy/Zomato direct API session expiry: cron detects 401/403 or bad status, marks platform session expired, dashboard keeps last good data visible with stale badge, owner gets a refresh action to paste/upload fresh cURL, backend validates replay before replacing stored token/cookie/CSRF, then cron resumes automatically.
recent_events.next_action: Implement session health model and refresh-cURL admin panel for HE/NCH aggregator dashboards before relying on fully automated direct API polling.
recent_events.mutation_status: UX/architecture guidance only; no partner portal, POS, Odoo, ad, WABA, price, or offer mutation

recent_events.summary: Explained that direct frontend API polling removes DOM/extension scraping but does not remove partner authentication. Recommended verifying whether Swiggy/Zomato partner logins support password login, but not building OTP bypass. Best architecture remains manual/authorized session refresh after OTP, storing only session material securely with expiry health and direct API polling afterward.
recent_events.next_action: Create a safe session-refresh flow for CTO cURL method: paste fresh Swiggy/Zomato cURL after login, validate replay, store token/cookie/CSRF securely, show expiry/health, then Cloudflare/Mac cron polls direct APIs.
recent_events.mutation_status: architecture/auth guidance only; no partner portal login automation, no POS/Odoo/ad/WABA/price/offer mutation

recent_events.task: Analyze CTO direct frontend API files
recent_events.summary: Deep-inspected /Users/nihaf/Downloads Swiggy/Zomato cURL and response files plus local direct partner puller. Confirmed CTO method is direct frontend API replay, not DOM scraping: Swiggy fetchOrders uses RMS API with access token and both outlet IDs; Zomato get-all-v2 uses merchant gateway API with cookie/CSRF headers. Dry-run replay currently returns HTTP 200 for both. Swiggy file is current/live fetch, not full historical; Zomato orders file is single rich detail payload, separate from history list.
recent_events.next_action: Build Cloudflare/Mac scheduled direct API updater with stored session material, pagination, health, and manual session-refresh path; capture Zomato detail endpoint if full per-order discount enrichment is required.
recent_events.mutation_status: read-only file/API analysis and dry-run replay only; no partner portal, POS, Odoo, ad, WABA, price, or offer mutation

recent_events.summary: Verified aggregator-pulse health live. Current live API reports order rows updated today but platform snapshots are stale since 2026-05-24, so the always-on extension polling path is not currently healthy. Explained that current/manual cURL/script updates run from the machine executing them; background live updates require a logged-in Chrome appliance on laptop or win PC, and stop when that machine/browser is off unless moved to an always-on host.
recent_events.next_action: Set up one always-on aggregator appliance, preferably win PC or dedicated Mac LaunchAgent/Chrome extension, with health visible on HE/NCH dashboards and no dependency on manual cURL.
recent_events.mutation_status: read-only health check and architecture explanation only; no partner portal, POS, Odoo, ad, WABA, price, or offer mutation

recent_events.summary: Inspected HN Aggregator Pulse extension, aggregator-pulse API, HE Swiggy auto-push, HE assembly API, and HE POS bridge read-only control plane. Found existing aggregator extension already keeps Swiggy/Zomato tabs warm, captures cookies/Swiggy Accesstoken, polls APIs every 5 min, queues data to hnhotels.in/api/aggregator-pulse, and API upserts idempotently. KDS/POS bridge pattern is browser-appliance plus cloud heartbeat/command/snapshot; assembly API is separate write path and must not be reused for analytics ingestion.
recent_events.next_action: Implement read-only live updater: extend Aggregator Pulse service worker or Mac runner to poll Zomato get-all-v2 and Swiggy history/fetchOrders for both HE/NCH, add per-platform health/last-success UI, and keep POS/KDS write endpoints isolated.
recent_events.mutation_status: read-only code/config inspection only; no partner portal, POS, Odoo, ad, WABA, price, or offer mutation

recent_events.summary: Redesigned HE/NCH aggregator dashboards to separate Swiggy and Zomato clearly. Added first-screen platform control lanes with Zomato customer/offer lens and Swiggy ops/fee lens; each lane shows orders, delivered revenue, AOV, exceptions, offer proof, top items, and needs-control rows. Updated revenue control and data coverage copy to reflect May 1-25 coverage for both platforms. Deployed cache-busted assets to /ops/he/aggregator/ and /ops/nch/aggregator/ and verified live HTML/JS contain platformBoard and v2 asset URLs.
recent_events.next_action: Use separated lanes to build exception/revenue action queue for price positioning and offer placement; keep mutation blocked until margin proof is mapped.
recent_events.mutation_status: dashboard UI deploy only; no partner portal, POS, Odoo, ad, WABA, price, or offer mutation

recent_events.summary: Verified live owner-orders coverage for May 1-25 across both outlets and platforms. HE: 152 orders = 132 Zomato + 20 Swiggy; delivered revenue 50459; discount-known 28. NCH: 55 orders = 35 Zomato + 20 Swiggy; delivered revenue 10357.11; discount-known 9. Normalized dashboard emits 24 fields per order; consistently populated core fields include platform, brand, order id, status/status_group, date/time, items, order value, captured_at. Swiggy history adds fee/discount/food-ready/handover signals but no customer name; Zomato history adds customer name and some detail/discount proof when order-detail captures exist.
recent_events.next_action: Design next dashboard layer around exception control, revenue leakage, offer proof, and demand-to-price decisions before any platform/POS offer mutation.
recent_events.mutation_status: verification/read-only analysis only; no partner portal, POS, Odoo, ad, WABA, price, or offer mutation

recent_events.summary: Confirmed Curl 2 was correct for Hamza Express because it used restaurant_id=1342888 and May 1-25 date range; Curl 1 was only May 25. Ran HE Swiggy history backfill May 1-25: 20 rows upserted. Verified HE May owner-orders now 152 total: 132 Zomato + 20 Swiggy, 140 delivered, 8 rejected, 2 missed, 2 active, delivered revenue 50459, discount-known 28. NCH remains 55 total: 35 Zomato + 20 Swiggy.
recent_events.next_action: Use HE/NCH brand dashboards to compare top demand, slots, discount-known rows, rejected/missed orders; do not execute offer/price changes until margin proof is mapped.
recent_events.mutation_status: read-only Swiggy data ingestion; no partner portal, POS, Odoo, ad, WABA, price, or offer mutation

recent_events.summary: Verified Swiggy past-orders endpoint /orders/v1/history with restaurant_id/date/limit/offset. Added swiggy_order_history ingestion and paginated Swiggy history backfill runner. Ingested NCH Swiggy May 1-25 from restaurant_id 1342887: 20 Swiggy rows upserted; NCH May owner-orders now 55 total with 20 Swiggy and 35 Zomato. User's Hamza cURL still had restaurant_id 1342887, so HE historical Swiggy remains pending until 1342888 cURL is captured.
recent_events.next_action: Get Hamza Express Swiggy history cURL with restaurant_id=1342888, run the same May 1-25 backfill, then compare HE/NCH item demand and offer proof before any price or offer action.
recent_events.mutation_status: read-only data ingestion/parser deploy; no partner portal, POS, Odoo, ad, WABA, price, or offer mutation

recent_events.summary: Deployed read-only HE and NCH aggregator dashboards at /ops/he/aggregator/ and /ops/nch/aggregator/ with Unified/Zomato/Swiggy tabs, demand slots, top items, offer proof, rejected/missed orders, ops issues, platform mix, and order ledger fed by owner-orders API. Verified May 1-25 production data split: HE 132 orders all Zomato; NCH 40 orders across Zomato/Swiggy. No partner portal/POS/Odoo/ad/WABA/price/offer mutation performed.
recent_events.next_action: Capture Swiggy historical/export endpoint cURL; then schedule local runner for Zomato day-window backfill and Swiggy current feed before any price/offer execution.
recent_events.mutation_status: dashboard/API read-only deploy; platform proof only; no aggregator portal, POS, Odoo, ad, WABA, price, or offer mutation

recent_events.summary: Backfilled Zomato order history from 2026-05-01 through 2026-05-25 using day-by-day get-all-v2 windows with pagination: 166 snippets, 166 upserted, zero failed windows. Production owner-orders explicit May 1-25 now returns 171 rows: 166 Zomato plus 5 Swiggy current rows, with 154 delivered, 11 rejected, 4 missed, 1 cancelled, 57 issue rows, 21 discount-known rows. Updated /ops/aggregator UI default to May MTD and pushed reusable scripts/aggregator-direct-partner-pull.mjs backfill support to GitHub main. Swiggy current cURL endpoint has no date-range/history fields; Swiggy historical needs separate endpoint/export before it can be fully backfilled.
recent_events.next_action: Find/prove Swiggy historical order endpoint or partner export, then add scheduled authenticated refresh/backfill and brand correction from Zomato resId detail before using data for price/offer execution.
recent_events.mutation_status: production D1 order-history ingestion and dashboard UI/script deploy only; no partner portal, POS, Odoo, ad, WABA, price, or offer mutation

recent_events.summary: Deployed /ops/aggregator owner order-history dashboard and aggregator-pulse owner-orders API to Cloudflare production via GitHub main commits d57d552/19a2f20 after direct Pages deploy was overwritten by GitHub auto-deploy. Ran one controlled direct partner cURL ingest: Swiggy HTTP 200 upserted 5, Zomato history HTTP 200 upserted 10, saved Zomato detail upserted 1. Verified hnhotels.in/ops/aggregator serves Aggregator Orders and owner-orders API returns today total 8 with delivered/rejected/cancelled rows plus week rejected/missed filters.
recent_events.next_action: Turn this into a scheduled refresh path: refresh authenticated partner cURLs/session safely, run ingest periodically, and add brand/outlet correction for Zomato list rows where only detail payload can prove resId before using the data for price/offer execution.
recent_events.mutation_status: production Cloudflare Pages/API deploy plus D1 order-history ingest only; no partner portal, POS, Odoo, ad, WABA, price, or offer mutation

Verified saved Swiggy and Zomato cURLs both replay HTTP 200 in dry-run; no portal/POS/Odoo/ad mutation or live deploy.

recent_events.task: Audit Azure Codex micro-step trail against price and offer objectives
recent_events.summary: Read raw Azure Codex session 019e1fac-d077-71a2-848f-995342f830e7 and source micro-step artifacts MS01-MS39. User's original objective in the trail is accurate price positioning plus accurate offer placing, not SEO/menu polish. Confirmed source roles: Swiggy DATA is order-volume demand; Zomato MG Road is rank-price perception; HE menu workbook is platform surface; POS is SKU universe; playbook is offer mechanic library. Found main drift: MS35 over-corrected toward no-offer as final strategy, while MS36 corrected that offers are mandatory but role-based/proof-gated. MS39 corrected context-collapse risks: missing Swiggy units/AOV, missing taxonomy, and direct-name price divergence. Saved audit note at _context/Delivery_Aggregator_Direct_API_2026-05-25/azure-session-019e1fac-microstep-context-audit.md. No portal/D1/POS/Odoo mutation.
recent_events.next_action: Build the next price-plus-offer design table from MS38/MS39: current portal card, target customer-paying price, base price, offer mechanic, effective price, commission/margin, stack/MOV/daypart proof, and execution gate per SKU.
recent_events.mutation_status: none - read-only raw session/artifact audit and ignored context note only

recent_events.task: Read source demand workbooks and micro-step intelligence context
recent_events.summary: Inspected the uploaded source zip drive-download-20260525T013325Z-3-001.zip: DATA.xlsx has 4,787 rows with 90,681 total order-count signal; MG Road rank-price workbook has 183 locality/cuisine/item rows. Re-read canonical FULL-INTELLIGENCE-MAPPING and MS35 final context/output. Core context confirmed: Swiggy DATA supplies actual demand-volume families; Zomato MG Road workbook supplies local rank-price perception corridors; HE menu workbook supplies executable SKU rows; playbook supplies offer mechanics only; proof/margin gates decide release. Highest demand families include biryani, dry starters, curries, rice, kebab, and breads. Final safe output remains 8 Zomato price-only rows; no offers/combo/Swiggy packet without proof.
recent_events.next_action: If continuing, produce a compact CTO-facing one-page explanation of the micro-step chain and data logic, or build the clean direct-ingest deployment branch; keep offer/combo execution blocked until proof/margin gates close.
recent_events.mutation_status: none - read-only workbook/context analysis and memory writeback only

recent_events.summary: Root cause was local parser error: the direct puller parsed -H headers but ignored cURL -b/--cookie, so Zomato CSRF headers were replayed without browser cookies and returned 401. Patched scripts/aggregator-direct-partner-pull.mjs to include -b cookies and added safe Zomato history summaries. Dry-run now returns Zomato HTTP 200 with 10 snippets and hasMore=true; no ingest/deploy/mutation performed.
recent_events.next_action: Use Copy as cURL exactly as captured; direct puller can now replay Zomato get-all-v2 from saved Downloads/zomato-curl.txt. Next gate is optional ingest dry-run review, then controlled API ingest only after approval.
recent_events.mutation_status: none - local parser fix and read-only dry-run replay only

recent_events.task: Save and dry-run updated Zomato partner cURL
recent_events.summary: Saved pasted Zomato partner cURL to Downloads/zomato-curl.txt and dry-ran direct partner puller. Swiggy replay remained HTTP 200 with current NCH orders; Zomato replay still returned HTTP 401, so no ingest/deploy/mutation was performed.
recent_events.next_action: Capture a fresh Zomato get-all-v2 request via DevTools Network using Copy as cURL, preferably directly to file instead of chat, then rerun dry-run before enabling ingest.
recent_events.mutation_status: none - saved local auth cURL and dry-run only; no platform/order/offer/margin mutation

recent_events.task: Analyze direct Swiggy/Zomato partner API scrape files
recent_events.summary: Analyzed /Users/nihaf/Downloads/swiggy-curl.json, swiggy-orders.json, zomato-curl.txt, and zomato-orders.json without printing secrets. Swiggy direct API path is proven: POST https://rms.swiggy.com/orders/v1/fetchOrders replays successfully with access_token/accesstoken headers and no cookie, returning live data; latest replay showed 1342887=NCH and 1342888=HE, confirming HE Swiggy ID 1342888. Zomato cURL path is not yet proven: POST https://api.zomato.com/merchant-gw/web/order/history/get-all-v2 returns HTTP 401 from the saved headers, while zomato-orders.json proves rich order-detail shape only. Locally patched functions/api/aggregator-pulse.js to fix inverted parsed Swiggy constants and add raw swiggy_fetch_orders/zomato_order_detail ingestion normalizers, plus added scripts/aggregator-direct-partner-pull.mjs dry-run puller. Dry-run verified Swiggy 200 and Zomato 401. No live D1 ingest or deploy performed.
recent_events.next_action: Capture a fresh replayable Zomato cURL including all required auth/session material; then deploy the exact aggregator-pulse.js ingestion fix from a clean branch/worktree and run the direct puller in ingest mode with HN_AGGREGATOR_API_KEY. Keep offer/combo portal actions blocked; this work only replaces the capture layer.
recent_events.mutation_status: Local code/context changes only: functions/api/aggregator-pulse.js, scripts/aggregator-direct-partner-pull.mjs, and ignored _context analysis. No Swiggy/Zomato portal mutation, no Odoo/POS mutation, no WABA/ad mutation, no live D1 ingest, no production deploy.
